title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat with local models in a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama. Plug local models into chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). ChatGPT-style interface, file uploads, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Simple fluent API with POJO mapping.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama. Async-first, strongly-typed, tokio-based.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fzf, history, and prompts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration: use Ollama models for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: RAG, function-calling, fine-tuning, Docker Compose stacks.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Experimental Ollama builds with NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM for 2-3× speed-ups.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and Compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package that wraps Ollama’s REST API for macOS/iOS apps.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLMs to your server with slash commands.
